description: Letter of Yoshiyahu ha-Nasi to Elʿazar ha-Sar. Generous spacing between the lines. The hand is known from other documents and dates to the 13th century. Only the beginning (or draft of the beginning) is preserved. On verso there is a list of parshiyot with an Arabic header.
description_he: מכתב מיאשיהו הנשיא לאלעזר השר, ריווח נדיב, המאה ה-13, רשימת פרשיות בגב הדף
